mission.title: cloud-native-network: `youki exec` did not join the correct pid namespace
mission.description: `youki exec` did not join the correct pid namespace. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current cloud-native-network deployment
steps.description:
Verify your cloud-native-network version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cloud-native-network -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cloud-native-network
helm list -n cloud-native-network 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working cloud-native-network installation.

steps.title: Review cloud-native-network configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant cloud-native-network configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n cloud-native-network -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cloud-native-network
kubectl get configmap -n cloud-native-network -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cloud-native-network
```
~~This will lead `youki exec` to fail at the moment.~~
```
[DEBUG src/container/builder_impl.rs:83] 2021-08-05T0856.915335338+02:00 failed to run container_init: Failed to clean up extra fds

Caused by:
    0: Failed to obtain opened fds
    1:

steps.title: Apply the fix for `youki exec` did not join the correct pid namespace
steps.description:
Fix #13 Fix #201
~~Note: I left `PreStart` hooks out since the spec mentioned that it is deprecated. Adding it takes no effort in the future.~~
Edit: I have to add this since integration and docker seems to use this.
Note2: I disabled `preserve-fds` for `exec` due to #185, so at least this code can
```yaml
[DEBUG src/container/builder_impl.rs:83] 2021-08-05T08:28:56.915335338+02:00 failed to run container_init: Failed to clean up extra fds

Caused by:
    0: Failed to obtain opened fds
    1: /proc/self/fd is not the actual procfs
    2: No such file or directory (os error 2)
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cloud-native-network -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cloud-native-network
kubectl get events -n cloud-native-network --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "`youki exec` did not join the correct pid namespace" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Fix #13 Fix #201
~~Note: I left `PreStart` hooks out since the spec mentioned that it is deprecated. Adding it takes no effort in the future.~~
Edit: I have to add this since integration and docker seems to use this.
Note2: I disabled `preserve-fds` for `exec` due to #185, so at least this code can be tested manually. This will be fixed immediatly afterwards.
codeSnippets:
[DEBUG src/container/builder_impl.rs:83] 2021-08-05T08:28:56.915335338+02:00 failed to run container_init: Failed to clean up extra fds

Caused by:
    0: Failed to obtain opened fds
    1: /proc/self/fd is not the actual procfs
    2: No such file or directory (os error 2)

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with cloud-native-network installed or the issue environment reproducible.
